title: Main Hoon Wanted
subTitle: A vagabond leads a carefree life and does anything for money. However, he lands in a difficult position when not only gangsters but also the police want to get their hands on him.

title: Khanjar
subTitle: Kumar, discovers his wife's infidelity and sends her away with their illegitimate son. Years later, the son returns to Simla, unaware of a serial killer's presence and his family's dark past.

title: Comedy Station
subTitle: A bumbling Bhojpuri producer Champaklal and his witty secretary Suzie clash comically as they navigate chaotic, low-budget filmmaking, outsmarting each other at every misadventure.

title: Men in Black 3
subTitle: Agent J of the Men in Black goes back in time to prevent the assassination of his partner, Agent K, at the hands of an alien criminal named Boris the Animal.

title: Krishnarjuna Yudham
subTitle: Krishna and Arjun are lookalikes from different parts of the world, who must work together to find the women they love after they are kidnapped.

title: Kabir Singh
subTitle: A genius but short-tempered surgeon falls madly in love with a girl. However, he begins to self-destruct after the girl's father marries her off to another.

title: Jumanji: The Next Level
subTitle: After Spencer goes missing, his team of confidantes comes back to Jumanji to go to the undiscovered regions and support him in escaping the world's most lethal game.

title: Param Sundari
subTitle: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

title: Anaconda
subTitle: A snake hunter offers his assistance to a documentary crew attempting to film an indigenous tribe in the Amazon. But as the journey progresses, his presence forces them to veer into dangerous waters.

title: CID
subTitle: A 'blind witness'- is good as an oxymoron as one can get. The witness at CID's disposal, the blind owner of the PCO, is the only witness who can identify the culprit.

title: Meri Shapath
subTitle: Vijay travels to Kolkata is search of what he lost long ago, where he meets a lively college girl. When he gets caught up in the midst of a goon family, several events unfold.

title: Main Awara Hoon
subTitle: Two brothers, Sanjeev, a vagabond, and Rajeev, an educated man, cannot get along and finally sever ties. However, their paths cross again when they both fall in love with Archana.

title: Monster Hunter
subTitle: Captain Artemis and her group of soldiers are pulled into a world where dangerous monsters and humans co-exist. Grappled by danger, they must find a way to escape with help from a mysterious hunter.

title: Dashing Diljala
subTitle: A young man goes through a rollercoaster of emotions when he falls in love with three different women at varying stages of his life that help shape him.

title: Gangotri
subTitle: Neelakantham's daughter, Gangotri, falls in love with Simhadri, their servant's son. They face opposition from Neelakantham and things get complicated when he tries to kill Simhadri.

title: Baadshah Pehlwaan
subTitle: Krishna, an orphan, is nurtured by the owner of a gym whose name is Sarkar. He rises against all odds to become a wrestler but eventually gets into a conflict with his mentor when he falls in love.

title: Mere Badle Ki Aag
subTitle: Annavaram pays a visit to his sister and brother-in-law, who reside in Hyderabad. While he is there, he is conned by thugs. Enraged, he decides to teach them a lesson.

title: CID
subTitle: A criminal terrorizes the city when he commits a spree of attacks on anyone named Rina Raj. With the help of a telephone directory. ACP Pradyuman and his team trace.
